cases.prompt: 우리 스타트업 exit 전략 짜줘. IPO랑 M&A 둘 다 검토하고 로드맵도.

assertions.text: Gives key metrics per stage and relevant case studies.

cases.prompt: Plan an acquisition strategy and Series A preparation for our company.

assertions.text: Lays out an M&A / acquisition strategy path.
Addresses funding / Series A preparation milestones.
